description: Testing infrastructure, documentation, feature flags, and monitoring

userStories.title: .1: Unit Test Suite
userStories.description: As an engineer, I need comprehensive unit tests for all agents and core logic.
acceptanceCriteria: Write tests for NLP Classifier Agent (20+ cases)
Write tests for Context Builder Agent (15+ cases)
Write tests for Memory Manager Agent (10+ cases)
Write tests for UX State Agent (10+ cases)
Write tests for memory ranking function (5+ cases)
Set up CI to run tests on every commit

userStories.title: .2: Integration Test Suite
userStories.description: As an engineer, I need integration tests to verify end-to-end flows.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: Create project → Create thread → Send message → Verify context
Test: Send @mention → Verify banner → Click "Attach" → Verify thread moves
Test: Archive project → Verify not in autocomplete
Write tests using Convex test utilities
Tests cover happy path + edge cases

userStories.title: .3: E2E Test Suite
userStories.description: As a QA engineer, I need E2E tests to verify UI interactions.
acceptanceCriteria: Set up Playwright for E2E testing
Test: User creates project from sidebar
Test: User types @Project and selects from autocomplete
Test: User sees attachment banner and clicks "Attach"
Test: User drags thread from "Chats" to project
All E2E tests pass in headless mode

userStories.title: .4: Performance Testing
userStories.description: As an engineer, I need to verify the system meets performance requirements.
acceptanceCriteria: Measure sidebar render time with 100+ projects (target <50ms)

userStories.title: .1: User Documentation
userStories.description: As a user, I want documentation explaining how to use projects and @mentions.
acceptanceCriteria: Write user guide: "Getting Started with Projects"
Add in-app tooltips for first-time users

userStories.title: .2: Developer Documentation
userStories.description: As a developer, I want documentation for the agent architecture and APIs.
acceptanceCriteria: Add JSDoc comments to all public functions

userStories.title: .3: Feature Flags and Rollout
userStories.description: As a product manager, I want to roll out this feature gradually to mitigate risk.
acceptanceCriteria: Monitor error rates and performance metrics
Set up alerts for critical failures

userStories.title: .4: Post-Launch Monitoring
userStories.description: As an engineer, I need to monitor the system in production to catch issues early.
